metadata.name: acapy_wallet_groups_plugin
metadata.summary: Agent plugin to add a group id to a wallet

modules.name: acapy_wallet_groups_plugin.v1_0
documentation: Handles the initialization of the plugin.

functions.name: acapy_wallet_groups_plugin.v1_0.setup
documentation:
Plugin initialization call.

This function is automatically called by ACA-Py during start up.

Args:
    context (InjectionContext): Context injected by ACA-Py.

modules.name: acapy_wallet_groups_plugin.v1_0.routes
documentation:
Multitenant admin routes.

This file has been copied from: https://github.com/didx-xyz/acapy/blob/1.1.1b0/acapy_agent/multitenant/admin/routes.py

We do this because we want to override two endpoints

functions.name: acapy_wallet_groups_plugin.v1_0.routes.wallets_list
documentation:
Request handler for listing all internal subwallets.

Args:
    request: aiohttp request object

functions.name: acapy_wallet_groups_plugin.v1_0.routes.wallet_get
documentation:
Request handler for getting a single subwallet.

Args:
    request: aiohttp request object

Raises:
    HTTPNotFound: if wallet_id does not match any known wallets

functions.name: acapy_wallet_groups_plugin.v1_0.routes.wallet_create
documentation:
Request handler for adding a new subwallet for handling by the agent.

Args:
    request: aiohttp request object

functions.name: acapy_wallet_groups_plugin.v1_0.routes.wallet_update
documentation:
Request handler for updating a existing subwallet for handling by the agent.

Args:
    request: aiohttp request object

classes.name: acapy_wallet_groups_plugin.v1_0.routes.GroupId
documentation: Deduplicate GroupId field definition, to append to following OpenApiSchema classes

classes.name: acapy_wallet_groups_plugin.v1_0.routes.CreateWalletRequestWithGroupIdSchema
documentation: Request schema for adding a new wallet which will be registered by the agent.

classes.name: acapy_wallet_groups_plugin.v1_0.routes.WalletListQueryStringWithGroupIdSchema
documentation: Parameters and validators for wallet list request query string.

classes.name: acapy_wallet_groups_plugin.v1_0.routes.UpdateWalletRequestWithGroupIdSchema
documentation: Request schema for updating a existing wallet.
